failure_asset.hypothesis_tested: rolling train-only exhaustion reversal score surface selecting intraday US100 M5 candidates by score-conditioned schedule
failure_asset.next_boundary: next C0002 run must change a meaningful model, score, feature, label, or trade-shape surface, not nudge R0002 thresholds or reuse exhaustion reversal as-is
failure_asset.reason_not_candidate: all 9 fold-isolated MT5 tick folds were losing and total fold-isolated tick net PnL was negative

supporting_lessons.summary: Schedule replay must skip proxy trades whose scheduled exit bar is followed by a data gap greater than one M5 interval because MT5 can fail the delayed close with trade retcode 10018 and block subsequent replay.

hypothesis_variant.summary: test whether rolling train-only scores can select exhaustion reversal candidates after stretched intraday moves before any equity-percent sizing
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: second C0002 true variant; changes direction construction, label shape, feature family, score interpretation, and trade shape from R0001 momentum continuation selection rather than nudging R0001 thresholds

notes: closed-bar MT5 mode is required for proxy-vs-EA logic parity
tick-mode MT5 is required for execution KPI management
fold-isolated MT5 tick and execution divergence are required before closeout
proxy must fit score surfaces only inside each rolling train window
proxy must report score diagnostics with applies true
proxy result cannot decide whether MT5 is attempted
mechanical parity must compare scheduled entries, directions, exits, and lifecycle behavior
tick-vs-closed-bar differences are execution divergence, not automatic logic failure

repair_records.summary: Skipped proxy trades when the scheduled exit bar is followed by a data gap greater than one M5 interval; MT5 could not close one gap-adjacent scheduled target with trade retcode 10018, which blocked subsequent schedule replay.

feature.summary: closed-bar stretch, reversal impulse, body alignment, extreme close, range state, and session-position features; no feature set selected

label.summary: train-only target-before-stop plus forward path quality label over a 12-bar closed-bar horizon; no label selected

model.summary: rolling train-only linear correlation score over exhaustion reversal candidates; no model family or score threshold is selected

trade_logic.summary: enter opposite the prior 12-bar stretched move on the next closed-bar open, select up to eight scored candidates per active day, and evaluate fixed-lot stop-target-max-hold reversal paths
